runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 10 over 460m at Warragul behind Paw Kattia beaten 5 lengths (26.61) in a Grade 5. Should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked in back straight and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Looks close to another win after her success on March 20 at Horsham over 410m. Last start was fifth over 450m in 26.40, behind Paw Harry. Must be included.
